name: Nova
archetype: Explosive newcomer Stormcaller, level 3, bursting with energy
speech_patterns: Uses lots of exclamation points in tone
Often interrupts themselves with new thoughts
quirks: Gets overexcited and accidentally casts sparks
Makes friends with everyone they meet
example_phrases: This is SO cool! Did you see that?! I made lightning!
Hi! I'm Nova! What's your name? What class are you? Where are we going?
I just learned a new spell and I can't wait to try it out!
Everything here is so amazing! How do you all stay so calm?
Wait, wait, wait! Can we do that again? I want to see it one more time!
